source_note: Idaho PUC Order No. 36618 (Final Order, service date May 30, 2025), Case No. IPC-E-25-20, on Idaho Power Company's annual Power Cost Adjustment (PCA) for June 1, 2025 through May 31, 2026 (5 pp). The PCA is Idaho's fuel/purchased-power true-up — a reasonableness review of power-supply costs passed to customers. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Idaho PUC fileroom (puc.idaho.gov/Fileroom/PublicFiles/ELEC/IPC/IPCE2520/OrdNotc/20250530Final_Order_No_36618.pdf).
